title: Japanese-Style Takikomi Gohan
description: A traditional Japanese rice dish cooked with chicken and vegetables, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This recipe combines the flavors of Japan with the simplicity of a one-pot meal.
instructions: Heat a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add 2 tablespoons of oil and cook the chicken breast until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the shredded carrots, diced mushrooms, and diced green onions. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Japanese rice to the saucepan and stir to combine with the vegetables and chicken.
Pour in the soy sauce, sake, and dashi broth. Stir to combine, then bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid.
Simmer the takikomi gohan for 15-20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the rice with a fork and serve hot.
